specific_location: Percival's Cabin, 5 miles N of Lake Isabel, west of Hwy 165 in the Wet Mountains
description: I was watching hummingbirds at my backyard feeder at my cabin in the Wet Mountains, when I noticed this odd bird, that wasn't any of usual ones. I commonly see Broad-tailed, Rufous, and Calliope, as well as Black-chinned once in a while here. This bird was similar to Black-chinned, though it had green head, shorter bill, and didn't pump the tail like the back chinned was doing. Photos taken.Behaviors: Coming a few times to feeders in back yard.Call: nonePlumage: fall plumaged
photographer: Photographer: Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival
